---
id: create-or-update-a-customer
title: "Create or update a customer"
description: "Upsert by ReferenceCustomer. If the reference already exists the customer is updated; otherwise a new customer is created."
sidebar_label: "Create or update a customer"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api-reference/proabono-api-live
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create or update a customer"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/Customer"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Upsert by ReferenceCustomer. If the reference already exists the customer is updated; otherwise a new customer is created.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
